Name: GobchatEx Roleplay Suite
Author: Shuro
Punchline: Everything you need for a nice roleplay session.
Description: Highlights Say, Emote, and OOC in the native chat log, alerts you on mentions, and colors sender names by player group — the roleplay suite for FFXIV.
FeedbackMessage: Open an issue on GitHub or ping the author in the Dalamud Discord.
